case_title: ELLIS HSU-MASTROMONACO CPA VS. DBH CONSTRUCTION, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 SERVED AUG-13-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HIGGINS, BENEDICT

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HSU-MASTROMONACO CPA, ELLIS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DBH CONSTRUCTION, INC. HIGGINS, BENEDICT $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $435.00, DEFENDANT DBH CONSTRUCTION, INC. WAIVES SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISIONER SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FILED BY HSU-MASTROMONACO CPA, ELLIS DBH CONSTRUCTION, INC. HIGGINS, BENEDICT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEPTEMBER 30, 2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT, BENEDICT HIGGINS WAS PRESENT AND REPRESENTING HIMSELF AND DBH CONSTRUCTION, INC. DBH CONSTRUCTION, INC. WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: JULIE RUMSEY; NOT REPORTED (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY DEFENDANT DBH CONSTRUCTION, INC.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HSU-MASTROMONACO CPA, ELLIS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,062.50 FILED BY HSU-MASTROMONACO CPA, ELLIS AS TO DEFENDANT DBH CONSTRUCTION, INC. HIGGINS, BENEDICT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2016 - JUDGMENT.
